creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
INN port is old.

Fix: 

change version to 2.3.1 from 2.3.0 in Makefile
use this distinfo file:

MD5 (inn-2.3.1.tar.gz) = 2032f076fb18f5fa87c8b763e83fbdd4

Nothing else seems to need changing.

Also, the distinfo file has execute permissions.  That seems incorrect.
How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
